festivals.title: New Year 2026
festivals.description: The beginning of a new year...

festivals.title: Swami Vivekananda Jayanti
festivals.description: Birth anniversary of Swami Vivekananda, celebrated as National Youth Day.

festivals.title: Makar Sankranti
festivals.description: Festival marking the sun's transition into Capricorn...

festivals.title: Indian Army Day
festivals.description: Marks the day Lt. Gen. K.M. Cariappa took over as Commander-in-Chief.

festivals.title: National Girl Child Day
festivals.description: A day to raise awareness about the rights of a girl child.

festivals.title: National Voters' Day
festivals.description: Established to encourage more young voters to take part in the political process.

festivals.title: Republic Day
festivals.description: India adopted its Constitution and became a Republic.

festivals.title: Sant Ravidas Jayanti
festivals.description: Birth anniversary of the legendary saint and social reformer, celebrated on Magha Purnima.

festivals.title: Maitri Diwas / Valentine's Day
festivals.description: A day to celebrate universal love and affection.

festivals.title: Magha Puja
festivals.description: An important Buddhist festival commemorating the spontaneous gathering of 1,250 disciples.
